candidates.why: Also represents current debt, but appears only in one older period and may overlap with the maturity line.
A current borrowings line appears in the current-liability section, but the same label also appears in non-current liabilities, creating ambiguity.

final_choice.row_label: Short-term portion of bank loans and other loans

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean current-maturity debt line and excluded lease-related rows. Avoided 'Borrowings' because the same label is used for both current and non-current sections, creating double-counting risk without row identifiers.
